thought.text:
60.46. Final task4-classic baseline was 35.16, now 60.46 — almost doubled.

The LLM-mode is unusable without API key (cases score 0). Looking at the formula `score_one(case)`: tests with `weight==0` get aggregated specially (weight 0 means must be 100 to count). All 12 perf cases have weight 1.0 (default). So both task4-classic (60.46) and task4-llm (0.00) are reported — the question is whether final score sums them or picks one. Let me re-check the score logic:
